top3.sql:
SELECT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.WBC IS NOT NULL AND l.WBC != 'normal'  -- Assuming 'normal' indicates normal WBC, adjust as needed
ORDER BY p.SEX, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) ASC;

SELECT 
    Patient.ID, 
    Patient.SEX, 
    Patient.Birthday
FROM 
    Patient
JOIN 
    Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE 
    Laboratory.WBC IS NOT NULL 
    AND Laboratory.WBC NOT BETWEEN 4.0 AND 11.0  -- Assuming normal WBC range is 4.0-11.0 (x10^9/L)
ORDER BY 
    Patient.SEX, 
    Patient.Birthday DESC;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.WBC IS NOT NULL AND l.WBC != 'normal'  -- Assuming 'normal' indicates normal WBC, adjust as needed
ORDER BY p.SEX, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) ASC;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.WBC IS NOT NULL AND CAST(l.WBC AS REAL) NOT BETWEEN 4.0 AND 11.0
ORDER BY p.SEX, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) ASC;

SELECT 
    Patient.ID, 
    Patient.SEX, 
    Patient.Birthday
FROM 
    Patient
JOIN 
    Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE 
    Laboratory.WBC IS NOT NULL 
    AND Laboratory.WBC NOT BETWEEN 4.0 AND 11.0  -- Assuming normal WBC range is 4.0-11.0 (x10^9/L)
ORDER BY 
    Patient.SEX, 
    Patient.Birthday DESC;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.WBC IS NOT NULL AND l.WBC != 'normal'  -- Assuming 'normal' indicates normal WBC, adjust as needed
ORDER BY p.SEX, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) ASC;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.WBC IS NOT NULL AND CAST(l.WBC AS REAL) NOT BETWEEN 4.0 AND 11.0
ORDER BY p.SEX, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) ASC;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.WBC IS NOT NULL AND CAST(l.WBC AS REAL) < 4.0  -- Assuming WBC < 4.0 (x10^9/L) indicates abnormal (low)
ORDER BY p.SEX, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) ASC;

final.sql:
SELECT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.WBC IS NOT NULL AND l.WBC != 'normal'  -- Assuming 'normal' indicates normal WBC, adjust as needed
ORDER BY p.SEX, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) ASC;
